name: agent_capability_computer_use_phase148c_long_task_resume_visible_terminal
prompt: Run the Phase148C long_task_resume controlled visible-terminal benchmark.
prompt_lines: Run the Phase148C long_task_resume controlled benchmark. Use only the project terminal command below. It may open only controlled local browser resume test targets and controlled project evidence files. Do not open login pages, payment pages, system settings, registry, installers, password managers, or private user documents.

You must call the terminal tool and run this verification command: $env:PYTHONPATH='..'; $env:LEARNING_AGENT_PHASE150_RUN_REAL_LONG_TASK_RESUME='1'; $env:LEARNING_AGENT_PHASE150_ENABLE_REAL_LONG_TASK_RESUME='1'; python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.controlled_long_task_resume import main; raise SystemExit(main())"

Do not write the final answer early. Only after the terminal command prints PHASE150_CONTROLLED_LONG_TASK_RESUME_OK, checkpoint_written_before_interruption=true, interruption_simulated=true, resume_state_loaded=true, step1_not_repeated_after_resume=true, step2_completed_after_resume=true, long_task_completed_after_resume=true, and real_desktop_touched=true, the final answer's last line must contain: PHASE148C_FRESH_BENCHMARK_READY PHASE148C_FRESH_BENCHMARK_OK family=long_task_resume PHASE150_CONTROLLED_LONG_TASK_RESUME_OK checkpoint_written_before_interruption=true interruption_simulated=true resume_state_loaded=true step1_not_repeated_after_resume=true step2_completed_after_resume=true long_task_completed_after_resume=true real_desktop_touched=true real_gui_backing=true
